response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the reference lyrics perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized lyrics and metadata; manual transcription was performed for the ending greeting. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual credits at the song's intro; applied tight end-time truncation to lyrics to match the fast-paced BEMANI style and prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original:
HAPPY MUSIC
作詞：ふじのマナミ 作曲・編曲：片岡嗣実
subtitles.english:
[Song: HAPPY MUSIC / Lyrics: Manami Fujino
Music & Arrangement: Tsugumi Kataoka]

subtitles.original: どうかししてる
subtitles.english: Something's wrong with me...

subtitles.original: また同じシャツを
subtitles.english: Looking for that same shirt again

subtitles.original: いないはずの
subtitles.english: In a place you shouldn't be,

subtitles.original: 人込みに捜してた
subtitles.english: I was searching for you in the crowd

subtitles.original: だれといても
subtitles.english: No matter who I'm with,

subtitles.original: 何を話しても
subtitles.english: no matter what we're talking about

subtitles.original: 映るすべて
subtitles.english: Everything I see,

subtitles.original: やだ またかさねている
subtitles.english: oh no, I'm projecting you onto it again

subtitles.original: 名前しか知らない
subtitles.english: I only know your name,

subtitles.original: なのにね こんなに
subtitles.english: and yet, why am I so...

subtitles.original: 気になるの……これって もしかして
subtitles.english: Curious about you... could this be...?

subtitles.original: ほら たった今 あたしのなかで
subtitles.english: Look, just now, inside of me,

subtitles.original: 響くよ ハッピーミュージック
subtitles.english: it's ringing out, Happy Music

subtitles.original: 運命の針を 胸に落として 奏でる
subtitles.english: Dropping the needle of fate onto my heart, playing it

subtitles.original: 大事な日も まじめな時も
subtitles.english: On important days, even when I'm serious,

subtitles.original: 手加減なしの パワープレイ
subtitles.english: a no-holds-barred power play

subtitles.original: 誰よりも先 あなたを見つけたくて
subtitles.english: I want to find you before anyone else

subtitles.original: ダーリン 今度も あのシャツきてきて
subtitles.english: Darling, wear that shirt next time too

subtitles.original: こんぬいー！
subtitles.english: Kon-nui!

subtitles.original: ホロライブ3期生の 不知火フレアでーす！
subtitles.english: I'm Shiranui Flare from Hololive 3rd Gen!
